metadata.description: Canonical corpus for anchor election determinism — same round + committee ⇒ same anchor

scenarios.description: 4 validators, round 2 — anchor = round % n = 2, repeated invocation must return same
4 validators, round 7 — anchor = 7 % 4 = 3, verifies mod arithmetic
4 validators, round 0 — anchor = 0 % 4 = 0, genesis round edge case
